name: Festive Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the broken nut meats and brown sugar in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix the remaining ingredients: flour, white sugar, baking soda, and salt.
3. Pour the dry mixture into a greased 9-inch X 9-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle the brown sugar/nut mixture on top of the batter.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
6. Serve topped with whipped cream or ice cream.
